news.t: Trump Media just launched 5 ‘Made in America' ETFs, testing whether political power can function as an investable theme

holdings.infoBox: TSES is an equity ETF with a total of 68 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 8.28%, Chevron at 8.27%, Eaton Corporation at 5.49%, ConocoPhillips at 5.14%, and Quanta Services at 3.63%.

overview.description: The Truth Social American Energy Security ETF (TSES) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund is passively managed to provide exposure to US energy companies. Companies with DEI policies are screened out, the remaining portfolio holdings are market-cap weighted. TSES was launched on Dec 30, 2025 and is issued by Truth Social.
infoTable: Truth Social Yorkville American Energy Security Index

data.title: Trump Media just launched 5 ‘Made in America' ETFs, testing whether political power can function as an investable theme
data.text: Wall Street has seen plenty of thematic ETFs, but not one with a sitting U.S. president acting as a de facto marketing engine.

data.title: Truth Social ETFs Launch Today
data.text: SARASOTA, Fla, Dec. 30, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Yorkville America Equities, sponsor and investment advisor for the Truth Social exchange traded funds (“ETFs”), announced that the first five Truth Soc...
